message:
🐛 Fix empty states showing during compliance hook loading (#2169)

Guard all compliance card empty states against premature display
while hooks are still scanning clusters. Two root causes fixed:

1. Cards showed definitive "No Compliance Tools Detected", "No policy
   violations", "No clusters with Kyverno detected" while refresh
   spinners were still running. All empty-state conditions now check
   isLoading/isRefreshing and show "Scanning clusters..." instead.

2. Compliance hooks (useKyverno, useTrivy, useKubescape) prematurely
   set isLoading=false when clusters.length===0 before useClusters()
   had resolved. Now checks clustersLoading to avoid the race.

Affected cards: RecommendedPolicies, PolicyViolations,
CrossClusterPolicyComparison, ComplianceDrift, FleetComplianceHeatmap,
KyvernoPolicies, TrivyScan, KubescapeScan

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
